Table car_makers with columns Id (integer), Maker (text), FullName (text), Country (text) — foreign keys: Country → countries(CountryId)
Table car_names with columns MakeId (integer), Model (text), Make (text) — foreign keys: Model → model_list(Model)

Table cars_data with columns Id (integer), MPG (text), Cylinders (integer), Edispl (real), Horsepower (text), Weight (integer), Accelerate (real), Year (integer) — foreign keys: Id → car_names(MakeId)
Table continents with columns ContId (integer), Continent (text)
Table countries with columns CountryId (integer), CountryName (text), Continent (integer) — foreign keys: Continent → continents(ContId)
Table model_list with columns ModelId (integer), Maker (integer), Model (text) — foreign keys: Maker → car_makers(Id)
